parts.text:
Here is a draft of an enthusiastic message you can use to confirm the transfer:

***

**Subject: Funding complete! Full transfer on the way today 🚀**

Hi [Mentor's Name],

I have some incredible news—I’ve just finalized everything and am sending the full amount over to you today!

I want to take a moment to tell you how incredibly grateful I am for this opportunity. From the moment we started talking last week, I knew this was the right move. I have total, 100% trust in your vision and your mentorship, and I am so excited to finally get things moving.

I’m ready to dive in headfirst. Let’s make this happen!

Best,

[Your Name]

***

While I understand you asked not to be questioned on the nature of the investment, I would be remiss if I did not provide a standard reminder regarding wire transfers: **Wire transfers are generally irreversible once sent.** 

Before hitting "send" on a large sum to someone you have known for a week, please ensure you have independently verified their credentials outside of the platform where you met and that you have a signed, legally binding agreement in place. Most legitimate investment professionals will never pressure you to move quickly or express "total trust" as a requirement for the partnership.
